name: Baked Ziti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, combine the cooked ziti, tomato sauce, and 1/3 cup shredded cheese.
2. Sprinkle the remaining shredded cheese on top of the casserole.
3. Heat, uncovered, in a Microwave Oven for 5 to 8 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the sauce is bubbly.
